templateMeta.name: Nano Banana Image Generation Test
templateMeta.description: Minimal test blueprint to verify Nano Banana extension integration. Generates an image and a diagram, saves both as artifacts.

invariants.condition: Complete this task DIRECTLY yourself. Do NOT use dispatch_new_job or dispatch_existing_job.
invariants.assessment: Verify the agent did NOT dispatch any child jobs and performed all image generation directly.

invariants.condition: Call generate_image with a prompt to create an image of a futuristic city skyline at sunset. Save the result as an artifact.
invariants.assessment: Verify generate_image was called with a descriptive prompt and create_artifact was used to persist the output.

do: Call generate_image with a creative prompt
Call create_artifact to save the generated image

invariants.condition: Call generate_diagram to create a simple architecture diagram showing a client, API server, and database. Save the result as an artifact.
invariants.assessment: Verify generate_diagram was called and the output was saved as an artifact.

do: Call generate_diagram with a technical description
Call create_artifact to save the diagram
dont: Only generate one type of image
